name: PB2 - Alert Enrichment via AbuseIPDB
description: Queries AbuseIPDB for the source IP reputation score. Attaches confidence score and country to the alert for analyst context.

trigger.description: Same webhook as PB1 — runs in parallel

parameters.description: Extract confidence score from AbuseIPDB response

notes: Register at https://www.abuseipdb.com to get a free API key
Free tier allows 1000 requests/day — sufficient for thesis evaluation
Response includes: abuseConfidenceScore (0-100), countryCode, isp, usageType, totalReports
